headline: Assessing CF Industries (CF) Valuation After Dividend Declaration And Optimism Around Upcoming Earnings
summary: Dividend decision and earnings expectations come into focus CF Industries Holdings (CF) has drawn fresh attention after its board declared a regular quarterly dividend of $0.50 per share, as analysts highlight expectations ahead of the company’s early May earnings report. See our latest analysis for CF Industries Holdings.
